title: Exploration Revamped
description: A mod that aims to build upon JetStarFish's Exploration mod by adding and improving useful exploration features!
body:
# A full list of the Mod's Features to help you explore the Minecraft world!![The Title Text for the Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20e7c3c7b70b367a8b1958fdd3d62e41855734ba.png)

## Minecarts

Updated the **Furnace Minecart**- it now goes **11 blocks per second ** on normal rails and is powered by coal. One coal lasts 20 seconds.

### Added 2 types of rails- Normal Powered and Super Powered
Normal Powered rails make you go 17 blocks per second and are crafted with Copper to give it more use! ![Normal Rail Crafting Recipe!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fc27dd19c524a4d77276e73c4d9feaae6c286e8.png)

Super Powered Rails- crafted with a DIAMOND but they make you go REALLY FAST- 25 blocks per second! ![Super Powered Rails Crafting recipe!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35056e68a61f91eddea349ca63a2d5a4352e276e.png)

**Spyglasses zoom 4x and you can adjust their zoom now.**

Iron Paddle Boat added- has double the speed of a normal boat but only has a durability of 20 minutes of use. ![Iron Paddle Boat Crafting Recipe!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2cbd66ce8ba7ffbead2f529d3c45b6e44851f4f.png)

Villagers no longer reroll trades and now there's a reroll item to change their trades.
![Villager Reroll Item Crafting Recipe!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d712acf4ae983908605f7b1cae14479ff9b6296c_0.webp)



There are 3 new compasses found in structures such as the ancient city, woodland mansion and trial chamber- the Copper Compass, that leads to a Trial Chamber, the Log Compass, that leads to a Woodland Mansion, and the Sculk Compass that leads to an Ancient City.

**You need to rightclick on these compasses once found for them to work.**

Elytras now use more durability when flying and MUCH more durability when using fireworks to boost.

Mending takes more XP to repair and phantom membranes are easier to obtain and provide much more durability when used with an Elytra

and more!
